# AgentUtils

> One API key. Agent-native utilities. https://agentutils.dev

## Authentication

All endpoints require `x-api-key` header with key starting with `au_`.
Create key at https://agentutils.dev/dashboard after signup.

## Quick Start

```
curl -H "x-api-key: au_YOUR_KEY" https://agentutils.dev/api/health
```

## Tools

### File Host — Ephemeral file hosting
Ephemeral file hosting
- POST /api/file-host — Upload a file — body:  (multipart, field: "file")
- GET /api/file-host/{id} — Retrieve a file

### JSON Cleaner — Normalize messy JSON
Normalize messy JSON
- POST /api/json — Clean and validate JSON — body: { json: string, schema?: any, sortKeys?: boolean }

### Dead Letter Queue — Capture and retry failures
Capture and retry failures
- POST /api/dlq — Capture a failure — body: { agentName: string, taskType: string, payload: any, error: string, retryWebhook?: string }
- GET /api/dlq?status=VALUE&page=VALUE&limit=VALUE — List failures
- GET /api/dlq/{id} — Inspect failure (full payload)
- DELETE /api/dlq/{id} — Dismiss failure
- POST /api/dlq/{id}/retry — Retry — forward payload to webhook

### Human-in-the-Loop — Pause agents for human approval
Pause agents for human approval
- POST /api/checkpoint — Create checkpoint (agent sleeps) — body: { agentName: string, taskDescription: string, state: any, webhookUrl: string }
- GET /api/checkpoint — List checkpoints
- GET /api/checkpoint/{id} — Poll checkpoint status
- POST /api/checkpoint/{id}/resume — Approve or reject checkpoint — body: { action: "approve|reject", reason?: string }

### AgentMarkdown — URL to clean markdown
URL to clean markdown
- GET /api/reader?url=VALUE — Convert URL to markdown

### Agent Shield — PII redaction and hydration (Pro+)
PII redaction and hydration
- GET /api/shield — Shield info
- POST /api/shield/clean — Redact PII from text — body: { text: string }
- POST /api/shield/hydrate — Restore original PII values — body: { text: string, sessionId: string }

### AgentVerify OTP — Temporary phone numbers for verification (Pro+)
Temporary phone numbers for verification
- POST /api/otp — Provision temporary phone number — body: { countryCode?: string }
- GET /api/otp — List active OTP sessions
- GET /api/otp/{id} — Poll for OTP code
- DELETE /api/otp/{id} — Cancel OTP session

## Rate Limits

- Free: 100 req/day, 5MB files, 1h retention — $0/mo
- Pro: 10,000 req/day, 50MB files, 24h retention — $29/mo
- Enterprise: Unlimited, 500MB files, 72h retention — $99/mo

## OpenAPI Spec
Full machine-readable spec: https://agentutils.dev/api/docs

## Response Format
All endpoints return: `{ success: boolean, data?: any, error?: string, code?: string }`
